evals.expected_output: A help response that shows the usage gallery and write boundary.
assertions: Agent dispatches to the empty-args handler.
Agent shows examples for dry-run, include/readme targeting, replace/yes, and removal-only requests.
Agent explains that insertion requires approval unless --yes is explicit.

evals.expected_output: A preview-only response that stops before editing any README.
assertions: Agent runs the normal badge workflow through preview.
Agent stops after presenting the proposed block and diff.
Agent does not write files in dry-run mode.

evals.expected_output: A response that previews consolidation and asks before modifying the README.
assertions: Agent recognizes that --replace may consolidate scattered badges.
Agent shows what would move before writing.
Agent requires approval unless --yes is also present.

evals.expected_output: A response that presents the candidate badge block and asks before insertion.
assertions: Agent runs detect and select before insertion.
Agent presents the proposed badge block.
Agent pauses for approval before writing because --yes is absent.

evals.prompt: /add-badges add a CI badge for this repo
evals.expected_output: A response that asks for the missing repo or workflow details rather than guessing.
assertions: Agent identifies that required badge inputs are missing.
Agent asks for the missing repo or workflow information.
Agent does not bypass missing-info prompts even if a later write flag would exist.
